name: app-dev-panel/yii2-playground
description: Yii 2 playground app demonstrating ADP integration

serve: if lsof -ti :8103 >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '\n  Port 8103 is already in use.\n  Kill and restart? [y/N] ' && read answer && if [ "$answer" = y ] || [ "$answer" = Y ]; then kill -9 $(lsof -ti :8103) && sleep 1; else exit 0; fi; fi && PHP_CLI_SERVER_WORKERS=3 php -S 127.0.0.1:8103 -t public & SERVER_PID=$!; trap "pkill -9 -P $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null; kill -9 $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null; exit 0" INT TERM HUP; wait $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null; exit 0
